title: PM Lane 315 - Project Miner Temp Power Customer Preview Review First Write Publication And Hosted Promotion Gate
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, used here to execute the already-admitted Temp Power customer-preview review first-write slice, publish it to clean-main, and classify the immediate post-publication hosted state truthfully.
activation_condition: The exact admission phrase ADMIT_TEMP_POWER_ACTUALS_CUSTOMER_CAPTURE_REVIEW_FIRST_WRITE_PACKET_ONLY is already present in the current instruction chain.
The actuals capture-review slice is already hosted-green from Lane 314.
There is no existing customer-preview review route implementation in apps/mutation-seam.

current_truth: The Temp Power customer-preview review first-write slice was implemented locally with focused tests, a local first-write proof runner, and hosted smoke wiring using the same bounded mutation-seam pattern as the admitted actuals slice.
Focused pytest for apps/mutation-seam/tests/test_temp_power_customer_preview_review_persistence.py passed locally with 6 passing tests.

The local first-write proof runner for the customer-preview review slice passed with accepted write, idempotent replay, delivery-blocked readback classification, unchanged downstream counts, and not_admitted delivery/finance/source-writeback boundaries.
The slice was published to clean-main as commit 666f649d020d19cc24d1a5e57b9a1796928f45d8 with commit title Add temp power customer preview review slice.

Bounded hosted smoke now passes on both https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com and https://apex-platform-mutation-seam.onrender.com with the Temp Power customer-preview routes present and the customer-preview status readback returning 200.
There is no remaining blocker inside the admitted Temp Power customer-preview review first-write slice.
allowed_actions: Publish only the admitted customer-preview review first-write slice to clean-main.
Use bounded hosted smoke with --include-temp-power-customer-preview-review and --include-temp-power-actuals-review to verify promotion on both hosts.
Update PM lane docs and canonical status only after hosted truth is revalidated.
not_allowed: No customer delivery completion claim or durable delivery evidence.
No finance, payroll, billing, invoice, or accounting outputs.
No auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.
No widening beyond the customer-preview review first-write slice.
validation: Focused pytest for temp power customer preview review persistence
Bounded hosted smoke on both the custom domain and the Render hostname using --include-temp-power-customer-preview-review
validation_result: PASS: local implementation, proof, publication, and dual-host hosted smoke are all green for the admitted customer-preview review first-write slice.
